assumptions: Annual values are treated as April-to-April snapshots and dated April 30.
2024 legacy pension values are carried flat from the last inferred/stated value until transfer to Vanguard on 2024-09-24.
A zero balance is recorded on 2024-09-24 for each legacy pension to avoid double-counting after Vanguard receives the assets.
Second legacy pension uses the stated 2018 and 2020 values, then follows the same annual percentage changes as the Standard Chartered pension.
